prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical fantasy anime illustration of Otohime, an ethereal young princess inspired by Japanese and Chinese court mythology, seated gracefully on a sunlit floor against a shimmering gold-leaf mosaic wall. Use a high-angle camera looking down at her, making her legs appear extremely long and elegant as one knee is raised close to the viewer. She has porcelain skin, soft blush, large warm brown eyes, glossy dark brown-black hair in an ornate updo, and delicate floral forehead makeup. Her hair is decorated with many pink blossoms, gold hairpins, thin gold chains, dangling red bead ornaments, and small sparkling gems. Dress her in a luxurious translucent hanfu-like gown with flowing layered silk and gauze in pale pink, coral red, aqua blue, and pearly white, off-shoulder sleeves, embroidered floral details, gold trim, tassels, and jewel chains across the bodice. She wears ornate earrings, necklaces, arm and shoulder jewelry, anklet-like details, and one pair of embellished high-heeled sandals. Her hands gently hold exactly 1 pink lotus flower near her raised knee. Surround her with exactly 6 visible falling pink petals drifting through the light. The background should be warm and opulent: cracked metallic gold tiles, reflective silver-gold fragments, painterly texture, and dramatic dappled sunlight casting leaf-like shadows across her face, shoulders, chest, arms, dress, and legs. Use romantic cinematic lighting, soft bloom, sparkling highlights, shallow depth of field, ultra-fine fabric transparency, delicate skin rendering, elegant sensuality without nudity, vertical 9:16 composition, masterpiece quality, no text, no watermark.
